name: Arizona Metals Corp.
description: Arizona Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold, copper, and zinc properties in Arizona, USA. The company's flagship projects include the Kay Mine Project, a high-grade volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS) deposit located in Yavapai County, and the Sugarloaf Peak Gold Project, an open-pit heap-leach gold target in La Paz County. Arizona Metals Corp. is committed to expanding its resource base through systematic drilling and exploration programs.
